title: Taylor's Eye Witness Latte Spoons – Set of 2 Stainless Steel Teaspoons with Long Handle for Iced Drinks, Cocktail, Dessert, Ice Cream Sundae, Coffee - Polished Finish, Dishwasher Safe Stirring Spoon
features: ✅ Versatile for More Than Just Coffee: Whether you’re digging into an indulgent knickerbocker glory, scooping up layers of a trifle, or stirring a thick milkshake, these sundae spoons handle it all. Ideal for stirring cocktails, mixing iced teas, or enjoying a classic ice cream sundae. From baristas to dessert lovers, these spoons are the ultimate kitchen essential for anyone who enjoys a little extra reach.

✅ Reach the Bottom of Every Cup: Tired of short spoons falling in your coffee? These long-handled latte spoons are designed to reach deep into tall mugs, sundae glasses, and iced coffee cups with ease. Perfect for lattes, cappuccinos, and milkshakes, they stir effortlessly while keeping your fingers clean from drips. A must-have for coffee lovers and dessert enthusiasts who appreciate style and function in every sip.

✅ Durable Stainless Steel – Built to Last: Made from premium stainless steel, these long teaspoons are rust-resistant, corrosion-proof, and designed to last. Unlike plastic or wooden alternatives, they won’t warp, stain, or absorb flavours. Whether you're using them daily for your morning latte or setting them aside for special occasions, these sturdy spoons will never let you down.

✅ Simple, Timeless Design: Each latte spoon features a minimalist yet elegant design, proving that simplicity and sophistication go hand in hand. The fine polished finish enhances any table setting without being flashy, making them a refined addition to both modern and traditional tableware collections. Whether you're stirring your morning latte or savouring an after-dinner espresso, this set of 2 spoons brings a subtle touch of class to every sip and scoop.

✅ Dishwasher Safe & Easy to Clean: Say goodbye to scrubbing! These long spoons are 100% dishwasher safe, making cleanup effortless. No need to worry about lingering stains from coffee, chocolate, or sauces—just pop them in the dishwasher, and they’ll come out gleaming every time. Perfect for busy households and anyone who loves convenience as much as they love their coffee.
description: The perfect spoon can make all the difference. Whether you're stirring a frothy latte, diving into a sundae, or mixing a refreshing iced coffee, this Set of 2 Latte Spoons from Taylor's Eye Witness is designed for effortless style and function. With an extra-long handle, these spoons easily reach the bottom of tall glasses, deep mugs, and dessert bowls without the mess—keeping your hands clean and your drinks perfectly blended. Crafted from premium stainless steel , these spoons are rust-resistant, durable, and built for everyday use. The sleek, polished finish adds a touch of elegance, while the simple, timeless design ensures they complement any cutlery collection. Whether you’re enjoying a thick milkshake, a layered trifle, or a classic cappuccino, these spoons offer the perfect balance of style and practicality. They are dishwasher safe , so you can enjoy your favourite drinks and desserts without the hassle of cleanup. Unlike plastic or wooden alternatives, they won’t warp, stain, or absorb flavours, making them a long-lasting kitchen essential for home use, cafés, and cocktail bars. Looking for a thoughtful gift? This 2-piece latte spoon set makes a simple yet practical present for coffee lovers, home baristas, or anyone who appreciates beautifully crafted utensils. Whether for birthdays, housewarming gifts, or simply elevating your own kitchen, these spoons add a touch of practicality and style to every sip and scoop. Forget short, flimsy teaspoons that don’t measure up— upgrade to a set of long-handled latte spoons that deliver on both function and style.
